mapper.select:
SELECT o.order_id, o.guest_id, o.total_amount, o.deposit_total, o.refund_amount, o.settle_time, o.operator, o.room_fee AS roomFee, o.food_fee AS foodFee, o.ktv_fee AS ktvFee, o.other_fee AS otherFee, g.name AS guest_name, r.room_number, r.room_type AS roomType FROM order_main o JOIN guest g ON o.guest_id = g.guest_id LEFT JOIN room r ON o.room_id = r.room_id WHERE o.status = '已结算' AND o.settle_time >= #{startDate} AND o.settle_time < #{endDate} + 1
AND (g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.room_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY o.settle_time DESC
